description: Perform a binary logistic regression using the 'InvisibilityCloak.csv' dataset to predict 'Cloak' based on 'Mischief' scores. The analysis must include odds ratios, a confusion matrix, and model fit statistics (Deviance, AIC, and Nagelkerke R²). Save the JASP analysis file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/LogisticRegression_Cloak.jasp. Additionally, create a summary text file at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/logistic_report.txt containing the following labeled values from the results: the coefficient (B), odds ratio (OR), and p-value for 'Mischief', the classification accuracy percentage, and the Nagelkerke R² value.
